plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Code review skill: analyzes modified code across 4 dimensions (vulnerabilities, logic, coupling, reusability) and outputs a prioritized optimization list.

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Smart git commit: checks staging status, handles partial staging with interactive confirmation, and writes conventional commit messages.

plugins.name: repo
plugins.description: Open the current repository's CI/Actions page in the browser. Supports GitHub Actions and GitLab Pipelines.

plugins.name: mempalace-auto-context
plugins.description: Auto-load MemPalace memory before substantive work: searches prior decisions, preferences, and durable project facts, then writes diary/drawer entries at task end.

plugins.name: mempalace-init
plugins.description: Install mempalace hooks for Claude Code and Codex CLI so each session's dialog auto-archives to wing_<basename(cwd)>. Idempotent.

plugins.name: mempalace-clean
plugins.description: Wipe all mempalace wings (drawers, diary, staging, hook state) while keeping hooks functional. Palace lazy-rebuilds on next session.

plugins.name: mempalace-kill
plugins.description: Full uninstall: remove mempalace hooks from Claude Code and Codex configs, delete the wrapper, then wipe ~/.mempalace/ entirely. mempalace CLI binary stays installed.
